title: facility — published macros
description: Two request-level macros that surface the resolved active facility from the RequestContext (set by facility.resolve_active middleware). Registered by FacilityServiceProvider::boot(). No Blueprint macros — the facility-owned tables use standard column shapes.
namespace_note: Macros extend Illuminate\Http\Request. Middleware-set context bleeds through the Request accessor without needing to plumb it through service constructors.

macros.name: Request::activeFacility
macros.adds: A single accessor on the framework Request class that returns the resolved Facility model (or null when no facility context).
macros.description: Reads from RequestContext::facility() set by the facility.resolve_active middleware. Lazy-loads the model on first access — subsequent calls in the same request return the cached instance.

macros.name: Request::activeFacilityId
macros.adds: Convenience accessor returning just the ID.
macros.description: Returns the id string without triggering the model load. Useful for creators that just need the FK.

no_blueprint_macros.reason: The facility module's owned tables (facilities, resource_bookings, day_passes, passes) use standard column shapes — no repeated JSONB blobs or shared column families that would justify a Blueprint macro. Contrast with localization::Blueprint::translations() which adds a shared JSONB column to N tables.
